response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:26: Identified as a performance of the song 'Cobra'. Performed by Houshou Marine. Used on-screen visual cues to confirm the song. 2. 02:27-04:59: Identified the second song as 'IT'S LOVE' based on on-screen text. Confirmed composers: Toshiya Noshita (Music) and Tomoharu Iwasa (Lyrics). 3. Transcribed the lyrics directly from the on-screen display in the video to ensure full accuracy.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a live concert performance by a Hololive VTuber, specifically Houshou Marine, singing two songs: 'Cobra' (the theme song to the anime Space Cobra) and an original song titled 'IT'S LOVE'. The performance includes dancing with backup performers.

scenes.description: The performer, Houshou Marine, performs the theme song 'Cobra' in a high-energy stage setting with backup dancers. The screen shows the title 'コブラ' in the top corner.
